items.title: Iran proposes ending conflict, discussing Strait of Hormuz amid US tensions
items.desc:
Iran's diplomatic overture could ease regional tensions, impacting global oil markets and potentially reshaping US-Iran relations.

items.title: How firefighters improvised & braved flames for 5 hrs to rescue 18 residents
items.desc: Delhi Vivek Vihar fire: 70+ firefighters battled flames for 5 hours, cutting grilles and bypassing faulty locks to rescue 17-18 residents.

items.title: IT dept pulls up depts over website compliance delay
items.desc: The Goa IT Department has issued a second reminder to government departments for compliance with crucial website security and accessibility standards to prevent cyber threats.

items.title: Patwari writes to Prez, flags ‘collapse of law & order’ in state
items.desc: Congress MP chief Jitu Patwari writes to President Murmu alleging law and order collapse after deaths from toxic syrup, contaminated water and Bargi dam tragedy.

items.title: Man, his two sons sentenced to life in jail over water row killing
items.desc: Jabalpur court sentences man and two sons to life for beating neighbour to death in Sept 2024 water dispute; each fined Rs 5,000.

items.title: Delhi likely to receive rain today
items.desc: Delhi weather update: IMD issues yellow alert for rain and gusty winds up to 70 kmph on May 6; temperatures to dip, AQI stays moderate.

items.title: What to do in case of a fire? Alert neighbours, leave valuables behind, avoid lifts while exiting building
items.desc: Fire safety tips for residential buildings: alert neighbours, leave valuables, check doors for heat, crawl under smoke, use stairs not lifts, seal rooms if trapped, and maintain AC wiring to prevent electrical fires.

items.title: What data says: 3-4 residential blazes a day, poorly planned exits, missing safety NOCs
items.desc: Delhi sees 3–4 residential fires daily; 1,318 calls in 2025-26. Short circuits, poor exits and missing fire NOCs drive deaths and injuries.

items.title: Murder
items.desc: Man stabbed to death at Lado Sarai petrol pump in south Delhi; two friends injured as youths chased and attacked trio while bystanders watched.

items.title: CCP team goes door to door to get ahead of dengue, malaria
items.desc: The Corporation of the City of Panaji (CCP) initiates a proactive pre-monsoon drive with NVBDCP to combat dengue and malaria by inspecting and eliminating mosquito breeding sites.

items.title: Silence on antisemitism shames us as British Muslims
items.desc: Growing up in Pakistan until my late teens, I never encountered a Jewish person. My passport permitted me to travel the world, but not to Israel, and so my intrigue at my first encounter with a Jewish person when I was in my twenties in New York was palpable.…

items.title: Come to your Census on RTÉ One: A shocked Dermot Bannon shivers, sensing ghosts all around
items.desc: Review: The programme brings a satisfyingly human touch to our understanding of the 1926 census, showing the complicated lives behind the raw facts and figures

items.title: CM proposes cloth bank at metro stations
items.desc: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta proposes cloth banks at metro stations to recycle garments via women’s self-help groups; DMRC marks 32nd anniversary, Phase V(B) planned.

items.title: EU Green Hydrogen Scheme Embraces High-Tech Solar Foods
items.desc:
The Finnish startup Solar Foods leverages a natural microorganism, renewable energy, and green hydrogen to produce Solein, a protein-rich food supplement produced through gas fermentation.

items.title: Trump to Kan News: Iranian proposal is unacceptable
items.desc: Trump tells Israeli media that he rejected Iran's 14-point proposal to end the conflict, adding that 'the campaign is progressing very well.'
